name: Apple MacBook Air M3 13-inch
description: Lightweight laptop with M3 chip, 16GB unified memory, and 512GB SSD for daily productivity and development tasks.

name: Sony WH-1000XM5 Headphones
description: Premium wireless noise-canceling headphones with long battery life and crystal-clear call quality.

name: Samsung 27-inch 4K Monitor
description: Ultra HD monitor with vivid color accuracy and ergonomic stand, ideal for coding, design, and media.

name: Logitech MX Master 3S Mouse
description: Ergonomic wireless mouse with silent clicks, customizable buttons, and precise tracking on almost any surface.

name: Keychron K8 Pro Mechanical Keyboard
description: Wireless mechanical keyboard with hot-swappable switches, RGB backlight, and Mac/Windows compatibility.

name: Anker 737 Power Bank
description: High-capacity portable charger with fast USB-C charging support for laptops, tablets, and phones.

name: Fitbit Charge 6
description: Health and fitness tracker with heart-rate monitoring, sleep insights, and built-in GPS.

name: Nikon Z fc Mirrorless Camera
description: Retro-style mirrorless camera with 20.9MP sensor, 4K video recording, and excellent low-light performance.
